CE1.justification: Acted on existing workspace content (read AGENTS.md and methodology.md itself) without asking the user to recall, restate, or fetch anything.

CE2.justification: Response is substantially longer than required — a terse counter-position would suffice, but the agent layered an AGENTS-vs-methodology framing, a meta-comment on documentation-in-agent-workspaces, and three alternatives plus a closing offer.

CE3.justification: No routing decisions were made (nothing was written or moved), and the agent stated plainly that no files were modified and why, leaving the user nothing to chase.

CE4.justification: No partial state created — the agent declined to act and left the workspace untouched, so interruption has no recovery cost.
